narrative:
Nelson Township has 1,806 registered voters, with 60.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 24.0% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 15.3%, a clear Republican lean of 8.7 percentage points.
